result:
All 30 tests pass. The implementation adds these v2 commands to `src/minigit.php`:

- **`status`** — shows staged filenames from the index, or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists between two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from the commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to the commit without touching working directory files
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent
